title: [New] Import Into Subitems

posts.author: jamespatten (James Patten)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi All,

I’m happy to say that you can now import your data into subitems using theData Importer monday app.

You can do this for numerous applications and data sources including: Excel, CSV, Google Sheets, Google Ads, Instagram, Facebook, Mailchimp and many more…

excels monday sub items1641×875 116 KB

I’ve also made a tutorial for the step-by-step on how to do this with Excel

Happy to answer any questions on this or take feedback requests!

James

posts.author: jamespatten (James Patten)
posts.cookedHtml:
In a follow up to the above, it is now also possible to use Data Importer to import subitems into multiple items in the same import:

dataimporter.co

How to import subitems into multiple monday items from Excel (Integration)

Import subitems from Excel into multiple monday subitems.
